TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FAHD ALKARSHI'S Motion For Issue, Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions is granted as it seeks an order deeming admitted Request For Admission Nos. 1, 3, 4, 7-18, and 21-28 as to Defendant Abdul Hubaishy only.
